'''wagomo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oidiomycosis|oidiomycosis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-g-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oidiomycosis|oidiomycosis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| wagomo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wægemeth|wægemeth]] || [[word:wægemej|wægemej]] || [[word:wægemesh|wægemesh]] || [[word:wægeme|wægeme]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wagogomoth|wagogomoth]] || [[word:wagogomoj|wagogomoj]] || [[word:wagogomosh|wagogomosh]] || [[word:wagogomo|wagogomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wagomoth|wagomoth]] || [[word:wagomoj|wagomoj]] || [[word:wagomosh|wagomosh]] || [[word:wagomo|wagomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wagofmoth|wagofmoth]] || [[word:wagofmoj|wagofmoj]] || [[word:wagofmosh|wagofmosh]] || [[word:wagofmof|wagofmof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wagomotho|wagomotho]] || [[word:wagomojo|wagomojo]] || [[word:wagomosho|wagomosho]] || [[word:wagomoko|wagomoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wagomoth|wagomoth]] || [[word:wagomoj|wagomoj]] || [[word:wagomosh|wagomosh]] || [[word:wagomo|wagomo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wagomothol|wagomothol]] || [[word:wagomojol|wagomojol]] || [[word:wagomoshol|wagomoshol]] || [[word:wagomokol|wagomokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wagomothotho|wagomothotho]] || [[word:wagomojojo|wagomojojo]] || [[word:wagomoshosho|wagomoshosho]] || [[word:wagomoko|wagomoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wagomothon|wagomothon]] || [[word:wagomojon|wagomojon]] || [[word:wagomoshon|wagomoshon]] || [[word:wagomokon|wagomokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wagomothoro|wagomothoro]] || [[word:wagomojoro|wagomojoro]] || [[word:wagomoshoro|wagomoshoro]] || [[word:wagomokoro|wagomokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
